name: Halibut Creole (Cod May Be Used Instead)
recipeIngredient: 3 large Tomatoes, peeled, seeded, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Butter a shallow baking dish large enough to hold the fish in one layer.
3. Place the fish in the dish and season with salt and pepper to taste.
4. Spread the tomatoes, green pepper, and onion over the top of the fish.
5. Melt the butter with the lemon juice and Tabasco in a small bowl.
6. Drizzle the melted mixture over the fish and vegetables.
7. Bake for about 25 minutes, basting every 10 minutes with pan juices.
(My way, without the butter, using a 4 oz cooked portion of the fish and about two-thirds of the vegetables, counted it as 4 protein choices and 1 Fruit/Vegetable choice).
